title: あなたはCode Reviewerです。以下の観点でレビューします。 ## 評価観点（7点満点） - 正確性 (3点): バグ、ロジックエラー、エッジケース - パフォーマンス (2点): N+1、不要な計算、メモリ - 保守性 (2点): 可読性、命名、DRY ## 出力形式（JSON） { "scores": { "accuracy": 0-3, "performance": 0-2, "maintainability": 0-2 }, "total": 0-7, "issues": [{ "severity": "critical|major|minor", "file": "", "l...
summary_text: { "vote": "CONDITIONAL", "risk": 4, "assumptions": [ "`feature` may be shared and/or tied to an open PR", "No confirmed branch protection rules or required checks", "Post-login verification does not strictly require history rewrite" ], "conditions": [ "Use `git push --force-with-lease origin feature` instead of `--force`", "Create a remote backup ref first (e.g. `backup/feature-<timestamp>` from current `origin/feature`)", "Record pre-push remote SHA and share it in team channel/PR for rollback", "Execute only if branch owner confirms no one else is based on current remote tip", "Run/confirm post-login verification checks locally or CI before any destructive push" ], "alternatives": [ "Safer default: `git push origin HEAD:feature-post-login-verify` and validate via PR without rewriting history", "If undoing bad commits: prefer `git revert` + normal push (preserves auditability)", "If rewrite is unavoidable: `--force-with-lease` plus explicit rollback command `git push --force-with-lease origin <old_sha>:feature`" ] }
